title: environment setup tasks ordered first
purpose: C5.2 defines environment setup tasks ordered first for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery.
scope: Owns `C5.2` only; siblings under `C5` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §5 — Branch C — Product execution plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#5-branch-c-product-execution-plane).
behavior_steps: When [D2.1](D2.1-index.md) enqueue triggers fire, the conductor dual-writes one `platform.promotion_queue[]` row with required fields—`id`, `source`, `target_level` (L1–L5), `priority`, and `effort_class`—plus optional `reason`, `fingerprint`, and partial promotion state.

On each pursuit wake, [B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) schema validation runs before dequeue; malformed rows remain at queue head and pursuit fails closed at H2 until the conductor repairs or removes them.
Schedulers read `target_level` and `effort_class` to route platform workers to the correct [D1](D1-index.md) ladder step and estimate drain cost before accepting a platform turn.

When [D3.2](D3.2-priority-boost-queue-depth-threshold.md) or [D3.5](D3.5-max-platform-backlog-age-force-drain.md) fire, higher-`priority` items dequeue ahead of FIFO without altering sibling row shapes.

Only the conductor may write queue JSON—concurrent manual edits reload each wake with a journal note; if a worker mutates `platform.promotion_queue` directly, scheduling and deduplication break and pursuit halts at H2 until state is reconciled.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `C5.2` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `C5.2` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `C5.2`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Map `C5.2` to v2.14â€“v2.23 release row in SEC-15-index.md.
Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_c5_2.py when script exists.
Validate `C5.2` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `C5.2` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `C5.2`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: C5.2 defines environment setup tasks ordered first for the agent-driven expert system. Product execution — pipelines, tasks, program, delivery. In practice, the system when [d2.1](d2.1-index.md) enqueue triggers fire, the conductor dual-writes one `platform.promotion_queue[]` row with required fields—`id`, `source`, `target_level` (l1–l5), `priority`, and `effort_class`—plus optional `reason`, `fingerprint`, and partial promotion state, then on each pursuit wake, [b1.1](b1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) schema validation runs before dequeue; malformed rows remain at queue head and pursuit fails closed at h2 until the conductor repairs or removes them.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-c 2026-06-28 -->

Environment setup tasks—portable Python, venv, VS solution, GitHub clone—must appear in task breakdown before library install tasks. AGENTS.md rule 17 requires the agent to install and verify local runnability, not leave setup to the user.

Ordering is enforced in task-breakdown skill behavior and audited in task card dependencies. Skipping env setup causes false implement complete when code cannot run locally.
